title: docs/knowledge/ skeleton + Bee OKF Profile area spec
action: Seed the bundle per D17: docs/knowledge/index.md (hand-seeded until S3 generates it; frontmatter carries ONLY okf_version: "0.1" per D4/OKF §9; body lists the top-level sections) and docs/knowledge/log.md (first entry under an ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD heading per OKF §7), plus empty-ready dirs areas/ features/ work/ decisions/ patterns/ runbooks/ (gitkeep or seeded README concepts NOT required — do not invent concepts, D10). Write docs/specs/okf-profile.md as a standard BA area spec (Purpose / Entry Points / Data Dictionary / Behaviors / Business Rules / Edge Cases / Open Gaps / Pointers) documenting the profile: the nine D18 types incl. bee.polarity, D19/D32 field rules and id/path direction, D31 authority rules, D33 carry-over map, D35 coverage report, D37 anchor-map stubs, D36 declared retirement of implement-plan.md, and the D11 standing exemption for docs/decisions/index.md. Update docs/specs/reading-map.md with the new area row. Frontmatter on okf-profile.md follows the existing docs/specs convention (area/updated/sources/decisions/coverage).

truths: node .bee/bin/bee.mjs knowledge check --json exits 0 on the skeleton with zero OKF errors
okf-profile.md states the profile is bee's own contract, citing knowledge-catalog#212 as open proposal, not standard
prohibitions: no invented concepts in the skeleton (D10)
no frontmatter in log.md; no keys beyond okf_version in root index.md
no edits to any legacy docs/specs area content

trace.outcome: Seeded docs/knowledge/ bundle (index.md hand-authored with okf_version-only root frontmatter, log.md's first ISO-dated entry) and wrote the Bee OKF Profile area spec (docs/specs/okf-profile.md) documenting the nine D18 types + polarity, D19/D32 field rules, D31 authority rules, D33 carry-over map, D35/D37/D36/D11, and knowledge.mjs's exact finding codes; added the okf-profile row to reading-map.md.
